text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation stepping into this environment. The glass walls and clean design suggest a space dedicated to knowledge and innovation. Upon seeing the colorful exhibit, I am drawn in further by the juxtaposition of art and technology, invigorated by the promise of discovery. The presence of research and development themes makes me reflect on humanity's drive to understand and shape the world. I feel both small and inspired, standing at the confluence of creativity and intellect.
